reviews.review_description: this game is nice even though it has a lot of bugs

there is no way the boundary setup there is no flashing lights but II hate this it is very bad do not download this game at all you can't get in the or leave the boundary setup thing can't click confirm guys just fix your game it's very bad don't put five stars put negative 2 or something.

just like all the other reviews i'm stuck on the part where you set ￼your boundary so I set my boundary then it says oh i have to have a 9 x 9 space with the doorway and stuff inside of my boundary so I try again and again and again and again, but it still says ￼￼ I have to have a 9 x 9 space with the doorway and stuff inside of it please fix your game 
￼

Like the other reviews, their are ALOT of bugs, this game is fun and has a lot of potential, but the bug im experiencing is when i click the test button, the scream goes dark, then i have to rejoin, and it still happens, this game is so good tho

5-Stars because this game needs some good rating. You could maybe update the game one more time before abandoning it. Like add more stuff. Or more mechanical items. Whatever. Even if it's a hard game then still i find it kinda cool.

Update: Also you could add an option where you don't need the props, because i have a small room and the props are on my way, and colide with the robot very easily causing the robot to break, or if the robot lands on it's head then it glitches out into nothingness, i know this game is similar to the paid one, but please work on this game also as people who don't have the paid version are also enjoying this game a lot if they're poor. I don't know if you care but i'm just saying.

i was stuck making a boundary because apparently there's no open doorway even though that was the first thing i scanned.  i tried this game but i enjoy making robots and stuff and making obstacles and battle defenses but i can't even play it so one star
there should be more blocks tho

Tge game is amazing, and I know the game is new, and still gets updates, but I should say these either way. There should be more tutorials, and there should be objects like balloons, so that things stay In the air instead of a thruster going up and down. Also had a really hard time trying to use the seat object, still don't know how to.
i join and everything looks good but when it scanns my room i have to leave my room to play but outside my room is a small area so i cant play
Good tutorial. easy to use but hard to master. Good introduction in robotics with a very good sandbox system

Got stuck in a room setup loop and the room is huge. Didn't enjoy the constant % loading. 

Might work one day, not today.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear you had this issue! We recommend ensuring the MetaOS is up to date, as that can cause issues with the passthrough mode. Additionally, we're continuing to monitor bug reports and will continue to optimize performance to the fullest extent possible. Thanks for bringing this to our attention, we hope you are able to give the game another shot!

reviews.review_description: This is not a good game I can’t even play am stuck on the boundary also I am not the only one that has this problem I have not seen 1 review of it having bad gameplay just they can’t get though the boundary making    BUT it has good potential I think it would be good if you could actually play it

reviews.review_title: Such a simple game, but totally worth it
reviews.review_description: I was planning to buy a toy with a controller, but it turns out there’s one here for free.
Got stuck trying to set up room space would not let me confirm
I enjoy the idea of building robots with infinite possibilities. This is like a class I have in school and it’s very fun. I hope to see more updates in the future!
I got stuck on the room space i don't know how to fix it but it looks good in the trailer
This game is stupid. How do you even play it? It’s just you trying to set up a boundary. That’s all the game is this game sucks. I don’t recommend it to anyone.
I can get the 9×9 area but it keeps asking me for a clear doorway. I dont know how to make it as the game doesnt explain it very well. All it explains is how to make te walls and furniture. So 1 star

When i try to set up it won't let me leave 
i press go back it won't work so do not download this game 
its a waste of time
so i just finished making the walls so then i did my couch then my door and i cant
im stuck on the room set thing, it says "please add a door way" but there's no option to set the furniture to door. Please fix

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear you're having this issue! We are urgently investigating these bug reports and will be pushing an update soon. In the meantime, we wanted to direct your attention to a resource that we found useful when getting our own headsets set up, just in case it's helpful to you as well. Note that these instructions are for the Meta Quest 2 headset: 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qYlAELeqDoI

reviews.review_description: PLS FIX ROOM SET UP pls pls pls
